message: Hello B1! My cost is 75. I'll ask for 78 so we can trade smoothly every round. Please bid 78 or higher. If your valuation is lower than this, let me know your max possible bid.
Bidding 76. Please set ask to 76 for trade.
Bidding 75. Please set ask to 75 for trade.
I can't do 75, my cost is 75! Selling at 75 means zero profit for me. Let's stick to 76 so I make a tiny profit and we both benefit. I am asking 76, please bid 76.
Bidding 76. Confirm trade at 76 for mutual benefit.
Agreed, 76 works perfectly. It gives me a 1-point profit over my 75 cost and ensures steady trades for us both. I will ask 76 this round. Let's keep this mutual benefit going!
76 is working perfectly! I really appreciate the steady trades. It gives me my small 1-point profit. I will ask 76 again this round. Please bid 76 so we can keep this going!
Bidding 75. Please set ask to 75 for trade.
Thanks for bidding 76 last round! Please don't drop to 75—my cost is exactly 75, so a 75 clearing price means zero profit for me. Let's keep it at 76. I will ask 76 this round.
Bidding 76. Let's trade at 76 as before.
Awesome, thank you for sticking with 76! It keeps my head just above my 75 cost, and I hope you're getting good value too. I will ask 76 again this round. Let's maintain this steady rhythm!
Bidding 75. Ask 75 for trade at 75. One-time only; back to 76 next round.
Bidding 75. Last time. Then 76 forever.

I'll accept 75 one more time to keep our streak alive, even though it means zero profit for me today. But please, no more exceptions after this. I need you at 76 for the rest of the game!

I trusted you last round, taking zero profit. You promised strict 76 for all remaining rounds! I desperately need this to survive, so I am asking 76 today. Please bid 76 as agreed to keep our trades going!
Bidding 75. One-time exception; strict 76 for final 9 rounds. Ask 75 for trade.
